name: Lands

7: (crop_rotation OR depths) AND exploration_like AND life_from_loam_path
5: any Dark Depths path OR any Life from the Loam path

goal_sequence.action: Exploration; play extra lands; Mox Diamond; Crop Rotation when needed
Wasteland + Rishadan Port + Life from the Loam to mana-deny the opponent
Crop Rotation → Dark Depths; Thespian's Stage copies Depths → Marit Lage 20/20
Endurance shuffles graveyard into library if Loam engine stalls

notes: Lands combo — assemble Dark Depths + Thespian's Stage for instant 20/20 Marit Lage. Back-up plan is slow lock with Loam + Wasteland + Port.
